tool.name: AlignAIR predict
tool.description: align IG/TCR reads into an AIRR rearrangement table

param.name: model
param.label: Model
param.help: A bundle directory, a catalog id, or an org/name Hugging Face repo id.

param.name: genotype
param.label: Donor genotype (optional)
param.help: YAML or FASTA: a subset of the model's reference (donor genotype). Novel alleles require training a compatible model.

param.name: metadata
param.label: Per-read metadata (optional)
param.help: e.g. 10x filtered_contig_annotations.csv; joined by read id.

tool.help:
**AlignAIR predict**
Aligns immunoglobulin / T-cell-receptor reads and writes an AIRR-C rearrangement table (V/D/J calls, coordinates, junction, and calibrated equivalence-set columns).
The *Model* may be a bundle directory, a catalog id, or a Hugging Face repo id. A *Donor genotype* (YAML or FASTA) is used as the reference for the run and may contain an allele subset and/or novel alleles. Optional *metadata* (e.g. a 10x annotations CSV) is preserved into the output, joined by read id.
